steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The strongest clue is “employ a range of styles” paired with the enumeration of distinct artistic traditions (traditional tribal, modernist, abstract expressionist, blended).

steps.title: Match the misconception
steps.content:
The misconception must be that Native art is homogeneous—uniform and all the same—which is the direct opposite of a range of styles.

The other choices fail: “uncontroversial” doesn't relate to stylistic variety; “individualistic” would actually be supported, not contradicted, by diverse artists; “theoretical” addresses a different attribute.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
